Our Story Gallery Forever
Siya&Aayush

A love story, written in little moments

From Niftel Communication… to forever 🌸

Scroll
✦   ✦   ✦

Chapter 01

The Boy I Noticed 👀

So I had just started my job at Niftel Communication. New place, new people… everything felt so unfamiliar and honestly a little scary.

And then there was him.

A senior. Calm, confident… a little distant. And somehow, the moment I saw him… I felt something I couldn't explain. I didn't know his story. I didn't know what this would turn into. But I just knew… he wasn't going to be just another person. 🥺

our first plan together ~
🌷

Chapter 02

The Mystery Room Date 🔐

I didn't really have friends there yet, so one day I gathered a little courage and just… texted him.

I asked if he'd join me for a mystery room plan. My heart was racing waiting for his reply omg 😭

He said yes.

And just like that… our first date began. It was simple, a little unexpected… but honestly? It felt so special. Like something had quietly started without us even realizing it. 🗝️

slowly, slowly...
💛

Chapter 03

Something More 🌙

What started as small conversations… slowly became something we looked forward to every day.

From random chats at work… to sharing things we wouldn't tell anyone else. Somewhere between those moments, we stopped being just colleagues.

And without any big confession… we both just knew. We had fallen into something real. ✨

no big words needed ~
🌙

Chapter 04

Us 💑

There wasn't a dramatic proposal. No perfect movie moment 😅

Just comfort… understanding… and a feeling that stayed. And one day, we simply said it out loud. We were together. Not just in words… but in everything we did after that. 🫶

home is wherever he is ~
🫶

Chapter 05

A Life Together 🏠

We started building a life together, learning each other beyond the good days.

We moved in together… shared the same space, the same routines, the same quiet moments after long days.

And somehow, even the most ordinary moments felt special with him. That's how I knew. 🌸

the scary-good step 🫣
🏡

Chapter 06

Two Families, One Story 👨‍👩‍👧‍👦

The biggest step wasn't just ours… it was bringing our worlds together.

We introduced each other to our families, not knowing how it would go. I was so nervous ngl 😅

But they saw what we already knew. And they said yes. Not just to us… but to everything we were building. 🙏

to be continued... 🤍
💫

Chapter 07

The Next Chapter 💍

And now… here we are.

Still the same two people who met at a new workplace, in a moment that didn't seem important back then. But it changed everything.

We're planning our wedding next year… not just as a celebration, but as the beginning of a new chapter. One that started so quietly… and turned into forever. 🌸💍

forever starts here 🌸
